P

playerCountRange - Variable in class mru.store.model.BoardGames
 
pressEnter() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints a message asking the user to press enter
promptAnimalMaterial() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints a message asking the user for a new animal's material
promptAnimalSize() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints a message asking the user for a new animal's size
promptAppropriateAge() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints a message asking the suer for a new toy's appropriate age
promptAvailableCount() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints a message asking the user for a new toy's available count
promptBoardGameDesigners() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints a message asking for a new board game's designers
promptBoardGameMaximumPlayers() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints a message asking for a new board game's maximum player count
promptBoardGameMinimumPlayers() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints a message asking for a new board game's minimum player count
promptFigureClassification() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints a message asking the user for a new figure's classification
promptInvalidSerialNumber() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints a message if the user's serial number is invalid
promptPuzzleType() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints a message asking the user for a new puzzle's type
promptToyBrand() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints a message asking the user for a new toy's brand
promptToyName() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints a message asking the user for a toy name
promptToyNameAdd() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints a message asking the user for a new toy's name
promptToyPrice() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints a message asking the user for a new toy's price
promptToySerialNumber() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints a message asking the user for a serial number
promptToySerialNumberAdd() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints a message asking the user for a new serial number
promptToyType() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints a message asking the user for a toy type
purchaseFail() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints if the user's item was not purchased
purchaseMessage() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
THis method prints asking the user if they want to purchase a toy
purchaseSuccess() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints if the user's item is sucessfully purchased
Puzzles - Class in mru.store.model
This class represents the toy type puzzle and extends from the general toy class.
Puzzles(String, String, String, double, int, int, String) - Constructor for class mru.store.model.Puzzles
This method initializes the general attributes of a toy plus puzzle type.
